claim_boundary: Engineering sequencing and evidence-readiness only. A SATISFIED prerequisite preserves the cited narrow result; READY or ACTION_REQUIRED is not a prediction, measurement, scientific verdict, activation approval, or evidence that HSWM already learns weights, routing, topology, transfer, or consolidation.

gates.action: Preserve the replicated typed source-policy answer actuation as a narrow L0 starting point.
gates.completion_evidence: Fresh seed-5 R2 heldout 6/6 typed versus 2/6 no-memory, four improvements, 24 calls, and LakatoTree server-regenerated replay.

evidence.claim_boundary: Fresh L0 answer-interface source-policy replication and deterministic server replay only; no result-to-credit-to-deltaW, Agent A-to-B transfer, learned topology rewiring, or consolidation claim.

gates.failure_boundary: Does not establish a generally learned compiler, Delta-W, Agent-A-to-B transfer, topology learning, or consolidation.

gates.action: Keep the A/B/MERGED-only ridge-conformal router rejected and do not tune its abstention threshold again.
gates.completion_evidence: All 54 standard cells failed, primary delta was zero, and even the frozen-arm oracle could not reach the registered minimum threshold.
gates.failure_boundary: Rejects this router-only action space, not every possible learned router or the HSWM programme.

gates.action: Preserve the neutral slow/fast bond readout and Gate-0 compiler boundary without making an efficacy claim.
gates.completion_evidence: Pure bond readout, full-candidate Gate-0 compiler, replay contract, attack tests, and LakatoTree DRAFT groundwork node remain hash-bound.

evidence.next_gate: full-candidate score-component pack plus neutral exact frozen-B2 reproduction before fitting or preregistration

gates.failure_boundary: Development headroom and module tests are not evidence that a learner can recover the oracle room.

gates.action: On the guarded GPU path, build the reproduction, full 2Wiki, and full MuSiQue component packs; lock and accept all three with exact neutral and frozen-B2 replay.
gates.completion_evidence: A real hswm-b22-gate0-acceptance-receipt/v1 that reopens its lock and all three packs and returns learner_allowed=true while scientific_claim_allowed=false.
gates.failure_boundary: No fast learner fitting, preregistration, or outcome inspection is allowed before this acceptance receipt validates.

gates.action: Freeze a query-by-bond fast-potential learner, then test outcome-to-used-bond eligibility-to-fast-candidate-to-slow-Delta-ell promotion with static-update, random-credit, shuffled-eligibility, no-promotion, and removal controls.
gates.completion_evidence: Fresh component-disjoint behavior changes only after a promoted rewrite, disappears when that rewrite is removed, preserves retention/canary, beats equal-budget flat/vector memory, and replays server-side.
gates.failure_boundary: Do not rescue the failed global scalar update by eta tuning or gate relaxation; if only fast attention works, do not claim durable slow-weight learning.

gates.action: Implement at least three registered LLM function roles with typed ports and compare the composed network against one frozen LLM workflow and vector memory under equal calls and tokens.
gates.completion_evidence: Role registry, per-call receipts, role-removal and role-shuffle controls, equal-budget sealed result, and deterministic orchestration replay.
gates.failure_boundary: Multiple prompts around one answerer or more calls without a role ablation do not establish an LLM-function network.

gates.action: Let Agent A write only through the validated HSWM mutation path, hide A's transcript, freeze Agent B, and test sealed unseen transfer against transcript and flat/vector memory arms.
gates.completion_evidence: Frozen B improves on fresh unseen work under equal compute, with A transcript hidden and causal-rewrite removal erasing the gain.
gates.failure_boundary: Exact-query cache reuse, B parameter updates, or transcript visibility are not shared-network transfer.

gates.action: Open exactly one typed CONNECT operation through the compiler, fresh evaluation, retention, canary, approval, CAS activation, and removal ablation.
gates.completion_evidence: One immutable topology candidate changes frozen-B behavior, beats weight-only and flat/vector controls, preserves provenance and retention, and rolls back by supersession.
gates.failure_boundary: No joint weight/router/topology search and no CONNECT/SEPARATE/SPECIALIZE claim from transient routing frequency.

gates.action: Measure route collapse, specialist starvation, forgetting, replay drift, recursion budgets, cost, rollback, and consolidation over long horizons.
gates.completion_evidence: Preregistered stability and retention bands hold across multiple epochs, seeds, regimes, and a second benchmark with bounded cost and deterministic recovery.
gates.failure_boundary: Short notebook gains or a single stable replay do not establish scalable continual HSWM learning.

next_actions.action: On the guarded GPU path, build the reproduction, full 2Wiki, and full MuSiQue component packs; lock and accept all three with exact neutral and frozen-B2 replay.
Implement at least three registered LLM function roles with typed ports and compare the composed network against one frozen LLM workflow and vector memory under equal calls and tokens.

programme_feedback: P1v4 is a real replicated L0 actuation result, but its n=6 source-policy cut is not Delta-W or a general learned compiler.
B2.1 already falsified the frozen A/B/MERGED router-only action space; threshold relaxation or another ridge sweep is not the next experiment.
The immediate weight-plane blocker is operational, not theoretical: the real three-role B2.2 Gate-0 component packs and acceptance receipt do not yet exist.
Query-conditioned fast bond attention must demonstrate causal behavior before repeated effects may become durable slow salience; attention is use, slow weight is memory, topology is structure.
F1 multi-role LLM function composition may proceed as an independent architecture lane, but P2 transfer waits for both a validated mutation lane and the function network.
LakatoTree receives this harness as DRAFT engineering groundwork only; no prediction or scientific result is registered by the harness.
